ingestion_settings.title: Ingestion settings
ingestion_settings.description: Control the entire ingestion pipeline: how often Notfeed wakes up, how often each font is fetched, what happens when you activate a new font, retention, and the CORS proxy chain.
ingestion_settings.scheduler_hint: How often the foreground scheduler wakes up to check which fonts are due. Lower values react faster but use more CPU.
ingestion_settings.intervals_hint: How often each font you activate is fetched. The interval depends on *your* state: the active interval applies while you're using the app, otherwise an idle-tier interval applies based on how long it has been since you last interacted.
ingestion_settings.tier_table_footnote: Tier thresholds chain together: tier-1 ends where tier-2 begins, and so on. All values are personal — they only affect your own polling cadence.
ingestion_settings.active_interval_hint: Minimum time between fetches for a font activated by you while you are using the app.
ingestion_settings.idle_tier1_interval_h: Polling interval used while you have been idle for less than the tier-1 threshold below.
ingestion_settings.idle_tier1_max_hint: Upper bound of the first idle tier. Below this value (in hours since your last interaction), the tier-1 interval applies.
ingestion_settings.idle_tier2_interval_h: Polling interval used while your idle time is between the tier-1 and tier-2 thresholds.
ingestion_settings.idle_tier2_max_hint: Upper bound of the second idle tier. Above this, the tier-3 interval kicks in.
ingestion_settings.idle_tier3_interval_h: Polling interval used after you have been idle past the tier-2 threshold. Designed to be slow — only you are affected.
ingestion_settings.activation_hint: What happens the moment you activate a new font (or re-enable one).
ingestion_settings.backfill_on_activate_: Copy posts already cached in other users' boxes for the same font, so the feed shows historical content immediately.
ingestion_settings.refresh_on_activate_h: Force a network fetch on activation, bypassing the regular polling window. Disable to wait for the next scheduled tick.
ingestion_settings.retention_hint: Old posts are first moved to trash (still recoverable, no longer in the feed) and only later physically deleted. Saved posts are never trashed.
ingestion_settings.trash_active_days_hin: For fonts *you* still have activated: posts older than this are auto-moved to trash. Applies only to your own post box.
ingestion_settings.trash_orphan_days_hin: For fonts *you* have deactivated but still have posts in your box: those posts are trashed sooner. What other users do with the same font is irrelevant — only your own activations count.
ingestion_settings.purge_days_hint: How long trashed posts stay recoverable before being permanently deleted from the database.
ingestion_settings.proxy_hint: Required when running in a browser. Tauri/desktop builds bypass proxies.
ingestion_settings.proxy_order_hint: Tried in order — first successful response wins.
ingestion_settings.proxy_applies_to: Applies to RSS, Atom, and JSON Feed feeds. Nostr fonts use relays directly and bypass proxies.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.settings_hint: Configure how Notfeed alerts you about new posts. Each step matches posts (per font or globally) and produces an inbox entry plus an OS notification.
notifications.master_toggle_hint: Master switch. When off, no step ever fires.
notifications.funnel_hint: A fixed three-step funnel that watches the feed-macros you create. Step 1 fires per matching post (click opens the post). Step 2 sends a per-macro summary (click opens the feed with that macro). Step 3 is the global catch-all (click opens the feed with all your macros combined).
notifications.step_per_post_hint: One notification per new post matched by the chosen macros. Includes title and excerpt. Click opens the post.
notifications.step_batch_macro_hint: One alert per chosen macro when it produces new posts. Click opens the feed with that macro selected.
notifications.step_batch_global_hint: Catch-all. Tells you that there are new posts somewhere. Click opens the feed with all your macros combined.
notifications.interval_floor_hint: Minimum {count} min — matches your ingestion polling. Set a larger value to be notified less often, never less.
notifications.no_macros_selected: No macros selected — step is silent
notifications.no_macros_yet: No saved macros yet. Create one on the feed page first.
notifications.inbox_hint: Recent notifications produced by the pipeline.
